notes: With-skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 3 evals (14/14 assertions)

The 3 failures are all 'correct-line-count' — without-skill agents use freeform code patterns instead of structured HIGHLIGHT_LINES arrays, so the grader regex misses them. The actual highlight regions may still be present but in a non-standard format.
With-skill runs use ~12% more time and ~15% more tokens, primarily because they run the Python CLI pipeline (setup, detect, generate) vs the without-skill agents who write code directly.

Key qualitative difference: with-skill produces deterministic, consistent TSX output. Without-skill output varies significantly in code structure, animation approach, and coordinate accuracy (visual estimation vs OCR).
